prompt: Replace the hut from the first image with the 2 rhinos from the second image, and add the giraffe from the third image to the scene.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Replace the wooden hut, located in the lower-left foreground, with the two rhinos from image 2, placing them in the same grassy area. Additionally, add the giraffe from image 3 to the mid-ground of the scene, positioned towards the right side of the frame, standing naturally in the grass.
